payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall dark brown/near-black wooden cabinet door with recessed rectangular panels and a narrow frame, occupying most of the crop; a vertical handle is visible near the right mid-edge and the upper-left portion is partially occluded by a light fixture; surface appears matte with subtle wood grain; approximate distance ~1.2 m from camera.
